ddls:
CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "program" TEXT /* Program the student is enrolled in */,
  "enrollment_year" INTEGER /* Year the student enrolled in the program */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the student */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the student */,
  "graduation_year" INTEGER /* Expected graduation year of the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_program FOREIGN KEY ("program") REFERENCES programs ("program_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "academic_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each academic record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "cgpa" REAL /* Cumulative Grade Point Average */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester for which the academic record is being maintained */,
  "gpa" REAL /* GPA for the specific semester */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_academic_records_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "engagement_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engagement metric */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "interactiveness" TEXT /* Level of student interactiveness (Yes/No) */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date when the engagement metric was recorded */,
  "engagement_score" REAL /* Engagement score of the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_engagement_metrics_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "skills_assessments" (
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each skills assessment */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "practical_knowledge" TEXT /* Assessment of practical knowledge */,
  "communication_skills" TEXT /* Assessment of communication skills */,
  "assessment_date" TEXT /* Date when the skills assessment was conducted */,
  "technical_skills" TEXT /* Assessment of technical skills */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_skills_assessments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employment_outcomes" (
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employment outcome */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "job_offer" TEXT /* Whether the student received a job offer */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title offered to the student */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company offering the job */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outcome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employment_outcomes_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the program */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department offering the program */,
  "program_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the program */,
  "program_type" TEXT /* Type of program (e.g., full-time, part-time) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_programs_department FOREIGN KEY ("department") REFERENCES departments ("department_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the department */,
  "department_head" TEXT /* Name of the department head */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "feedback_details" TEXT /* Details of the feedback provided */,
  "date_provided" TEXT /* Date the feedback was provided */,
  "feedback_type" TEXT /* Type of feedback (e.g., academic, career-related) */,
  "follow_up" TEXT /* Follow-up actions taken based on the feedback */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "career_services" (
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each career service */,
  "service_name" TEXT /* Name of the service */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the service */,
  "service_provider" TEXT /* Name of the service provider */,
  "service_cost" REAL /* Cost of the service */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_services" (
  "participation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participation record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "service_id" INTEGER /* ID of the career service */,
  "date_participated" TEXT /* Date the student participated in the service */,
  "service_rating" REAL /* Student's rating of the service */,
  "service_feedback" TEXT /* Student's feedback about the service */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_services_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_services_service_id FOREIGN KEY ("service_id") REFERENCES career_services ("service_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employment_statistics" (
  "statistic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employment statistic */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program */,
  "employment_rate" REAL /* Employment rate for the program */,
  "employment_rate_trend" TEXT /* Trend of employment rates over time */,
  "average_salary" REAL /* Average salary of employed students */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statistic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employment_statistics_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictive_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each predictive model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Algorithm used in the model */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the predictive model */,
  "model_description" TEXT /* Description of the predictive model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_inputs" (
  "input_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model input */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the predictive model */,
  "input_name" TEXT /* Name of the input */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the input */,
  "input_description" TEXT /* Description of the model input */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("input_id")
)
